titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the A. H. Sasse Papers
titlestmt.author: Stephanie Bredbenner

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

conventiondeclaration.citation: translation missing: en.enumerations.resource_finding_aid_description_rules.Describing Archives: A Content Standard

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday February 21, 2019 at 04:00

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

did.abstract: Business correspondence, circular letters, printed promotional materials, stock certificates, deeds, leases, receipts, ledgers, and plat maps documenting A. H. Sasse's businesses and investments, circa 1907-1954.

langmaterial.language: Chiefly in English, some letters in German.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Purchased from Michael Vinson on the Frederick W. and Carrie S. Beinecke Fund for Western Americana, 2018.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged into three series: I. Correspondence and Business Records, circa 1907-1954. II. Ledgers, 1923-1935. III. Maps, undated.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: A. H. Sasse was a businessman and investor in Pueblo, Colorado, circa 1907-1954. He invested in the gold mining, oil, and gas industries, and started several companies, including Fruitol Manufacturing and Supply Company, Golden Queen Mines and Investment Company, Searchlight Investments, A.H. Sasse Company, and A.H. Sasse Investments Association, which he referred to as his "Wiggletail" project.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: A. H. Sasse Papers. Yale Collection of Western Americana, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Collections are processed to a variety of levels, depending on the work necessary to make them usable, their perceived research value, the availability of staff, competing priorities, and whether or not further accruals are expected. The library attempts to provide a basic level of preservation and access for all collections, and does more extensive processing of higher priority collections as time and resources permit. This collection received a basic level of processing, including rehousing and minimal organization, in 2019.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Business correspondence, circular letters, printed promotional materials, stock certificates, deeds, leases, receipts, ledgers, and plat maps documenting A. H. Sasse's businesses and investments, circa 1907-1954. 12 autograph ledgers detail Sasse's investments, expenditures, and profits, including lists of investors. Includes annual lists of Sasse's properties, assets, and holdings and 4 plat maps relating to Sasse's investments in oil and gas in Arkansas, New Mexico, Louisiana, and Colorado. Includes materials relating to Fruitol Manufacturing and Supply Company, Golden Queen Mines and Investment Company, A.H. Sasse Company, Searchlight Investments, A.H. Sasse Investments Association, Goldfield Consolidated Mines Company, Owenwood Oil Corporation, Progressive Gold Mining and Milling Company, Vitek Oil and Refining Company, Bucher Smackover Trust Company, Moco Oil Corporation, Cosby Oil and Gas Company, Milton Oil Company, Royalty Products Company, Empire Chief Mining Company, Republic Insurance Company, Vindicator Development Corporation, E.L. Smith Oil Company, Champion Winkler Oil Corporation, Income Oil and Royalty Company, Silver Leaf Metals Incorporated, United Empire Gold Mines Company, Butler Oil and Refining Company, and Mytus Gold Corporation.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: The A. H. Sasse Papers is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

subject.part: Oil and gas leases -- United States
Petroleum industry and trade -- United States

corpname.part: Golden Queen Mines and Investment Company
Progressive Gold Mining and Milling Company

scopecontent.p: 12 autograph ledgers detailing Sasse's investments, expenditures, and profits, including lists of investors.

scopecontent.p: 4 plat maps relating to Sasse's investments in oil and gas in Arkansas, New Mexico, Louisiana, and Colorado.
